description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light panels, extensive glass windows, and multiple balconies with glass railings. A rooftop garden is visible, adding greenery to the upper level. The house includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool, and an outdoor lounge area. There is a carport on one side, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small overhang and steps. The landscaping includes several trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and a poolside deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport, and central balcony with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the rooftop garden, outdoor deck, and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, wooden deck, and extensive glass facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main balcony, additional outdoor seating, and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, steps, and a minimalist door design
